title: Xtra Creamy Ukrainian Cheese Casserole
description: This earthy and energizing Ukrainian dish features a delicious cheese pull and is made with macrobiotic-friendly ingredients, including lemon juice, and is slow-cooked to perfection in a ramekin.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion and mushrooms until they are softened.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
In a large bowl, combine the pre-soaked buckwheat, cottage cheese, lemon juice, dill, salt, and black pepper, and stir until well combined.
Add the cooked onion and mushroom mixture to the bowl and stir until the ingredients are fully incorporated.
Transfer the mixture to a ramekin and smooth the top.
Cover the ramekin with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
